case_title: WEBB, CLIFFORD CHRISTOPHER et al VS LOW, ELVIRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,550.09 FILED BY WEBB, CLIFFORD CHRISTOPHER ROSE, DERRICK AARON AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, ELVIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $758.41 FILED BY LOW, ELVIRA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WEBB, CLIFFORD CHRISTOPHER ROSE, DERRICK AARON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE ON 8/16/ 04 AT 1:30 PM;PAID $10 CHECK;FOLDER UTL;TO TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-21-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-18-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, CLIFFORD CHRISTOPHER ROSE, DERRICK AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOW, ELVIRA $899.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 INTEREST, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,171.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LOW, ELVIRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WEBB, CLIFFORD CHRISTOPHER ROSE, DERRICK AARON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LOW, ELVIRA
